title: The New World Awaits
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Jinbe, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The central beat is the new world awaits.
scene: The scene focuses on the new world awaits, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Jinbe, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do not forget this debt we owe.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: We're gonna play at being heroes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Then buy me one from there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't wait to meet him ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll leave this hat with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's a precious possession of mine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...Call that final ocean by another name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And the man who conquers that sea...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The sunny won't let us down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't worry about getting injured, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'll make sure you never go hungry!!

summary: The New World Awaits. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
